title: Supergirl Social Media Embargo Lifts Early: First Reactions
excerpt: Warner Bros. surprised everyone by lifting the social media embargo for Supergirl six days early. While critics are praising Milly Alcock and calling it a grimy, 'Mad Max' style space adventure, comic purists are a bit more divided on the adaptation choices.
wtTake: Moving the embargo up almost a week is a massive vote of confidence from DC, but comparing a cosmic superhero movie to Mad Max and True Grit is wild. If the practical effects are as good as they say, this is going to be an immediate theater watch.
bodyText: Moving the embargo up almost a week is a massive vote of confidence from DC, but comparing a cosmic superhero movie to Mad Max and True Grit is wild. If the practical effects are as good as they say, this is going to be an immediate theater watch. Warner Bros. surprised everyone by lifting the social media embargo for Supergirl six days early. While critics are praising Milly Alcock and calling it a grimy, 'Mad Max' style space adventure, comic purists are a bit more divided on the adaptation choices.
